2604.25313.title: Faithfulness-QA: A Counterfactual Entity Substitution Dataset for Training Context-Faithful RAG Models
2604.25313.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models frequently produce answers grounded in parametric memory rather than the retrieved context, undermining the core promise of retrieval augmentation. A fundamental obstacle to fixing this unfaithfulness is the lack of training data that explicitly requires models to prefer context over internal knowledge. We introduce Faithfulness-QA, a large-scale dataset of 99,094 samples constructed through counterfactual entity substitution. Starting from two established extractive QA benchmarks--SQuAD and TriviaQA--we automatically identify answer-bearing named entities in each context, replace them with type-consistent alternatives drawn from a curated bank of 76,953 entities, and thereby manufacture controlled knowledge conflicts between context and parametric memory. Rigorous quality filtering ensures 100% pass rates across four automated checks on random 200-sample audits. We release the full dataset, the construction pipeline, and a typed entity bank covering eight named entity categories. Faithfulness-QA is designed as a training resource for attention-based faithfulness objectives and as an evaluation benchmark for measuring context-grounding behavior in RAG systems. Data and code are available at https://github.com/qzhangFDU/faithfulness-qa-dataset.
2604.25313.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）模型經常產生基於參數記憶的答案，而非檢索到的上下文，這削弱了檢索增強的核心承諾。修正這種不忠實性的根本障礙是缺乏明確要求模型偏好上下文而非內部知識的訓練數據。我們引入了Faithfulness-QA，這是一個由99,094個樣本組成的大型數據集，通過反事實實體替換構建而成。從兩個已建立的抽取式問答基準——SQuAD和TriviaQA開始，我們自動識別每個上下文中的答案承載命名實體，並用從76,953個實體的策劃庫中提取的類型一致替代品替換它們，從而製造上下文和參數記憶之間的控制知識衝突。嚴格的質量過濾確保在隨機200樣本審核中四項自動檢查的通過率達到100%。我們發布了完整數據集、構建管道以及涵蓋八個命名實體類別的類型實體庫。Faithfulness-QA旨在作為基於注意力的忠實性目標的訓練資源，以及作為評估RAG系統中上下文基礎行為的評估基準。數據和代碼可在https://github.com/qzhangFDU/faithfulness-qa-dataset獲得。
2604.25313.author: Li Ju et.al.
2604.25313.authors: Li Ju, Junzhe Wang, Qi Zhang
